results.title: Recommended Hardware for Running LLMs Locally - GeeksforGeeks
results.snippet: The GPU is the most critical component for LLM workloads, handling parallel operations, attention layers and large matrix multiplications. High VRAM directly affects which model sizes can run locally without aggressive quantization, making it the main bottleneck to consider when choosing hardware.
